description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style, featuring large glass windows and multiple outdoor terraces. The structure is composed of several rectangular volumes, some with rooftop gardens and glass railings. The exterior combines dark and light panels, with wood decking extending around the house and a spacious patio area. A swimming pool and outdoor lounge area are situated on one side, while a staircase provides access to the upper level. The landscaping includes a few trees and shrubs, enhancing the contemporary urban setting. The house appears to have an open-plan layout with significant use of glass for natural lighting and visual connection to the outdoors.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, wood decking, and a pool, featuring minimalist design and rooftop terraces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, glass facade, rooftop terrace, and driveway with landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the outdoor pool, wood deck, and upper-level terraces with glass railings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, patio lounge area, and extensive glass windows on both levels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, deck, and the integration of greenery around the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass walls
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with wide steps, glass door, and minimal overhang, integrated into a glass and panel facade
